name: chem1_loop
note: Chemistry experiment loop, 20-frame seamless loop @10FPS (2.0s/cycle — frame count padded 1.25x so realtime playback feels like 0.8x speed). She slowly pours the beaker into the Erlenmeyer flask, then brings the flask up in front of her face and swirls/shakes it to mix. PROP RULES (repeat every frame): cone-shaped Erlenmeyer flask with glowing vivid magenta-pink liquid ALWAYS in the hand on the LEFT side of the image; small straight-sided beaker with vivid cyan-blue liquid ALWAYS in the hand on the RIGHT side of the image; both vessels drawn with an opaque pale blue-white glass tint (NEVER transparent); CRITICAL for seamlessness — the liquid levels in BOTH vessels stay exactly the same in every single frame (cartoon logic: the beaker never empties, the flask never fills). Frame 0 and frame 19 must match exactly. Frame 0 also equals the last frame of chem1_start and the first frame of all three end clips.
frames: Pose: BASE pose of the loop: standing upright with feet close together under her hips, the cone-shaped Erlenmeyer flask filled with glowing vivid magenta-pink liquid held level at chest height in the hand on the LEFT side of the image, the small beaker of vivid cyan-blue liquid held at shoulder height in the hand on the RIGHT side of the image, both vessels opaque pale-tinted glass. Calm focused expression, small smile, eyes on the flask. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: the pour begins: the hand on the RIGHT side of the image carrying the beaker of cyan-blue liquid moves inward, positioning the beaker just above the open mouth of the Erlenmeyer flask (LEFT side of the image, magenta-pink liquid, held steady at chest height). Beaker starting to tip slightly, no liquid falling yet. Eyes locked on the flask mouth, careful focused expression, eyebrows knitted. Liquid levels unchanged, both vessels opaque pale-tinted glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: the first drop: the beaker (RIGHT side of the image) tipped just far enough that a single glowing droplet of cyan-blue liquid falls from the beaker lip toward the flask mouth, the flask (LEFT side of the image) held perfectly steady at chest height. Liquid levels unchanged. Breath held, eyes wide with careful focus. Both vessels opaque pale-tinted glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: pouring: the beaker (RIGHT side of the image) tilted over the flask mouth, a thin glowing stream of cyan-blue liquid falling from the beaker lip into the Erlenmeyer flask below, the flask (LEFT side of the image) held perfectly steady at chest height. Liquid LEVELS inside both vessels unchanged despite the stream (cartoon logic). Utterly focused expression, tip of her tongue peeking out of the corner of her mouth. Both vessels opaque pale-tinted glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: still pouring slowly, key frame: same composition — beaker tilted on the RIGHT side of the image with a thin glowing cyan-blue stream falling into the steady flask of magenta-pink liquid on the LEFT side of the image, liquid levels in both vessels unchanged — her head leaning in a touch closer, eyes narrowed in careful concentration, a single sweat drop beside her temple. Both vessels opaque pale-tinted glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: the pour finishing: the beaker (RIGHT side of the image) leveling back upright so the cyan-blue stream thins and stops, the flask (LEFT side of the image, magenta-pink liquid) still steady at chest height, liquid levels unchanged. Her expression relaxing into a satisfied little smile, shoulders easing down. Both vessels opaque pale-tinted glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: putting the beaker aside: the hand on the RIGHT side of the image lowering the upright beaker of cyan-blue liquid down to her side at hip height, while the hand on the LEFT side of the image starts raising the Erlenmeyer flask of magenta-pink liquid up from chest height. Liquid levels unchanged, both vessels opaque pale-tinted glass. Curious anticipating expression, eyes following the flask. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: the flask rising: the hand on the LEFT side of the image lifting the Erlenmeyer flask of magenta-pink liquid past her collarbone toward her face, elbow bending, her chin lifting to meet it, the beaker of cyan-blue liquid now resting at her hip on the RIGHT side of the image. Liquid levels unchanged, both vessels opaque pale-tinted glass. Eyes brightening with anticipation, small open-mouth smile. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: flask at face level: the hand on the LEFT side of the image holding the Erlenmeyer flask of glowing magenta-pink liquid directly in front of her face at eye level, elbow bent, the beaker of cyan-blue liquid resting in the other hand down at her hip on the RIGHT side of the image. Liquid levels unchanged, both vessels opaque pale-tinted glass. Big curious eyes peering at the flask contents, mouth a small 'o'. Feet close together, body upright. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: the mixing shake begins: the flask of magenta-pink liquid in front of her face tilting toward the LEFT side of the image as her wrist swirls it, the liquid inside sloshing up the LEFT inner wall of the flask (level and amount unchanged), the beaker of cyan-blue liquid steady at her hip on the RIGHT side of the image. Her head tilting slightly toward the LEFT side of the image following the motion, focused eyes. Both vessels opaque pale-tinted glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: shaking, opposite beat: the flask in front of her face now tilting toward the RIGHT side of the image, the magenta-pink liquid sloshing up the RIGHT inner wall of the flask (amount unchanged), tiny motion arcs beside the flask, the beaker of cyan-blue liquid steady at her hip on the RIGHT side of the image. Her head tilting slightly toward the RIGHT side of the image, eyes following the swirl, cheeks puffed in effort. Both vessels opaque pale-tinted glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: shaking, back again: the flask in front of her face tilting once more toward the LEFT side of the image, the magenta-pink liquid sloshing up the LEFT inner wall (amount unchanged), small motion arcs on both sides of the flask now, the beaker steady at her hip on the RIGHT side of the image. Her head bobbing with the rhythm, determined pout. Both vessels opaque pale-tinted glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: vigorous swirl, key frame: the flask in front of her face held upright but shaken in a tight circular swirl — the magenta-pink liquid inside forming a small whirlpool with a couple of tiny bubbles (amount unchanged) — her whole upper body wiggling with the motion, hair swaying. The beaker of cyan-blue liquid steady at her hip on the RIGHT side of the image. Determined grin, sparkling eyes. Both vessels opaque pale-tinted glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: still swirling: flask upright in front of her face, whirlpool of magenta-pink liquid spinning inside (amount unchanged), her shoulders bouncing lightly, hair swaying the opposite way. The beaker of cyan-blue liquid steady at her hip on the RIGHT side of the image. Playful concentrated grin, one eye squinted. Both vessels opaque pale-tinted glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: the shake winding down: the flask in front of her face steadying, the magenta-pink liquid inside settling flat with one last tiny bubble (amount unchanged), her body coming back to center, hair settling. The beaker of cyan-blue liquid steady at her hip on the RIGHT side of the image. Expression easing into satisfied curiosity. Both vessels opaque pale-tinted glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: inspecting the result: flask held still at eye level in front of her face on the LEFT side of the image, magenta-pink liquid calm and glowing (level unchanged), her eyes narrowed studying it closely, small thoughtful pout. The beaker of cyan-blue liquid steady at her hip on the RIGHT side of the image. Both vessels opaque pale-tinted glass. Feet close together, body upright. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: a little approving nod: still holding the flask at eye level on the LEFT side of the image, magenta-pink liquid calm (level unchanged), her chin dipping in a small satisfied nod, eyes softening, lips curving into a pleased smile. The beaker steady at her hip on the RIGHT side of the image. Both vessels opaque pale-tinted glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: lowering the flask: the hand on the LEFT side of the image bringing the Erlenmeyer flask of magenta-pink liquid back down from her face toward chest height, while the hand on the RIGHT side of the image lifts the beaker of cyan-blue liquid from her hip back up toward shoulder height. Liquid levels unchanged, both vessels opaque pale-tinted glass. Content little smile, eyes following the flask down. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: almost back to the base pose: the flask of glowing magenta-pink liquid settling level at chest height in the hand on the LEFT side of the image, the beaker of cyan-blue liquid arriving at shoulder height in the hand on the RIGHT side of the image, liquid levels unchanged, both vessels opaque pale-tinted glass. Calm focused expression returning, small smile. Feet close together, body upright. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: SEAMLESS LOOP CLOSER — must match frame 0 exactly: standing upright with feet close together under her hips, the cone-shaped Erlenmeyer flask filled with glowing vivid magenta-pink liquid held level at chest height in the hand on the LEFT side of the image, the small beaker of vivid cyan-blue liquid held at shoulder height in the hand on the RIGHT side of the image, both vessels opaque pale-tinted glass, liquid levels unchanged. Calm focused expression, small smile, eyes on the flask. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.
